summary:
ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND BRAIN IMPLANTS: Brandon discusses a new technology called Cognify, designed by a Muslim inventor, which uses AI chips implanted in prisoners' brains to rehabilitate them by altering their brain chemistry and making them feel their victims' pain. Brandon states this technology aligns with a vision he had in 2014 regarding the Mark of the Beast, asserting that these implants are similar to Neuralink and will be used to turn people into zombie-like followers who worship the Antichrist.

GEOPOLITICS AND GLOBAL CONFLICTS: Brandon outlines several international events, including an alliance between the United States and Israel that he compares to the biblical relationship of Jonathan and David. Brandon predicts an escalation of the war in Europe involving Zelensky, Macron assuming a dictator-like role in the European Union, and Putin striking Warsaw with a devastating new weapon. Brandon also foresees Israel attacking Iranian oil refineries, which will lead to massive gas shortages and lines similar to the 1970s, despite new oil and gas deposits being discovered for Israel and the United States.

ECONOMIC UPHEAVAL AND CRYPTOCURRENCY: Brandon forecasts a severe economic collapse worse than the 1930s, accompanied by trade wars, violent riots over government entitlements, and severe supply chain issues, including medical and food shortages. Brandon emphasizes a four-year window for a major spiritual harvest funded by wealth transfers, specifically mentioning Donald Trump and the rise of a digital end-time currency. Brandon warns of extreme volatility in the cryptocurrency market involving assets like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, XRP, Cardano, and Algorand, predicting that only a highly disciplined one percent of investors will retain their wealth while others will lose everything.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND WEATHER WARFARE: Brandon warns of deliberate weather manipulation designed to attack populations, resulting in catastrophic super hurricanes, tornadoes, and hail. Brandon recounts a recent trip through Florida, particularly Miami, noting a heavily oppressive spiritual atmosphere and observing that the general public remains entirely unaware of the impending global and domestic crises. Brandon advises taking practical survival steps, such as moving to the country, growing gardens, and securing independent water sources.
rawData: [March 05, 2025]-[Look - the beginning of the Mark of the Beast technology]-[https://youtu.be/4eieXdIrDIQ]-[Good morning, family. Thank you for joining me today. Braden and I are driving around; Diana had some things she had to do, and I said, 'Well, let's make a video for the family while we're sitting here.' I thought this was a cool backdrop with this Route 66 painting on this wall. Look at that, isn't that neat? Somebody worked really hard on that. I just thought it makes a good video for y'all, something to look at. I wanted to talk to you all about this link that I got from someone in an email. They sent a video where a lady's talking about a chip that a Muslim man has designed. It causes you not to have emotions when they put it in you, and they want to experiment with prisoners. I'll let Braden put it in there so you can see this video because it's that alarming. It's exactly what I told you the Lord showed me in Tribulation when I went to tribulation with Him. I said it's similar to Neuralink, but it is not Neuralink. This chip, this new AI technology, is designed to somehow be put in your brain, and it causes your brain to be rewired so that you think differently. It's designed to rehabilitate prisoners. Instead of putting you in prison for 10 or 20 years for whatever felony you were convicted of—depending on how severe the punishment is—they will reprogram your brain with AI technology to make you think differently. They will give you the option: go to prison for that sentence or let AI technology reprogram your brain with this Mark of the Beast chip, which is what I believe it is. I think this is interesting because I told everybody it's not Elon Musk, but it's similar. This is a similar thing, and it will work with Starlink. I warned everybody this is coming. When this guy sent me this video and told us to look at this new technology that this Muslim man made, I told Diana, 'Study this; we've got to know if this is legit.' And it's legit; he has his own YouTube channel. Braden and I were both like, 'Oh my God,' because folks, this is exactly what the Lord showed me: that they will do this to reprogram people to be like zombies and worship the Antichrist on Fridays. I knew it was some kind of technology similar to Neuralink, but I knew it wasn't Neuralink; it would be a piggyback off of Neuralink. I thought, 'When is this coming?' I've prayed over this since 2014, when the Lord put this on my heart. Whenever I had the visitation from the Father—like I had this out-of-body experience where He took me out of my body all night long and took me to tribulation—He warned me of what was coming. In 2014, none of this stuff was really going on, but now we're seeing a Muslim man say that it's reprogramming people's minds. They send these AI technology waves into your brain to make you think differently so that you don't have to go to prison. They just reprogram your brain, but it makes you not normal. You'll see the video right here of everything that this TikTok lady's talking about. But then when you research this, the guy is legitimate. He has his own YouTube channel, and he's brilliant. They are coming up with a new prison that allows inmates to serve years of their sentence in just a matter of minutes. The criminals are going to have a choice: spend tens of years behind bars or get the artificial memory implanted into their brain. This process is called Cognify, and the intent of it is to treat the criminal like a patient. They're going to try to change the person's brain chemistry. After this process, when they re-enter society, they will be new and reformed, and they won't even be capable of committing any other crime. The chip can make the patient feel empathetic. Depending on the severity of the crime, the chip can also make you feel the emotional and physical pain of the victim and the family members. You can feel what they felt. The process only takes about seven minutes, but to the patient, it seems like it has been years. Last year, the US government spent 8.7 billion taxpayer dollars on the prison system. They say with this new prison, they can save money for healthcare and education. Also, they feel there will be so many reformed people that don't commit crimes. Do y'all think this is actually going to work, or do y'all think that they're creating something that they don't even know they're creating? I tried to tell you all when Jesus said, 'I'm standing at the door and I'm coming.' We see all the things in the news about Israel, what the Lord warned me about Jonathan and David. Israel is saying Benjamin Netanyahu said that Trump was the greatest president and friend that Israel has ever had, and we're seeing it play out. What the Lord warned me to tell you all is that we have a Jonathan and David relationship taking place right now, and it would be a three-stranded cord. The covenant we have as people—how we've been lackadaisical and how we've stood with the covenant we've made with the Lord as a nation—making a strong tie to Israel would bring a blessing on America. The Lord warned me about a four-year window for a major harvest. A major outpouring of His Spirit beyond anybody's comprehension is coming. I told you in that four-year window, the Lord said, 'What will you do with this time that I've given you? Will you squander it? Will you waste it, Brandon? Or will you reach out and go and get the lost? For the harvest is plentiful, and the laborers are few.' The Lord said to me, 'It's time for the people to bring in the harvest.' We will see the greatest outpouring of the Spirit of the Lord like we've never seen before, and the finances are going to take place first. It takes finances to produce the Gospel; it's not free. We see President Trump—when I told you all, I warned you what the Lord said to me when Diana and I were just interceding and praying. He told me about the line, and He said they're bringing forth the end-time currency, the digital platform. We're seeing the digital platform being unfolded right in front of our faces. But He said, 'What the devil is going to use for bad in the future, I will do for good right now.' He said, 'Brandon, there are great days of harvest ahead.' Even last night in my prayer time, He told me again, 'Brandon, don't be down. I told you the greatest days are ahead of you, days of great joy.' These days will be fun. This is what we've all been waiting for. He told me the crypto market will be very volatile. I'm not a real educated man when it comes to this kind of stuff. I dropped out of high school and got my GED. I cleaned bathrooms because I had so many learning problems, and I'm not a person who is real educated about the financial markets. All I know is I pray, and the Lord will speak to me and tell me what's coming. That's why I was a janitor for so long, because I couldn't read and do anything with computers. I had to have Diana help me with everything. She helped me get my GED; I barely even passed that. But the Lord told me, 'I will take the foolish things of the world and confound the wise.' He said, 'Stay humble, deflect everything to me, son. Always give the glory to me.' I told the Lord I'll do whatever He asks me to do. I'll come on here and tell you all what's coming. I'm not always saying I'm right about the timing. There's a depth perception to it. I've said that a thousand times. People say, 'I thought you said there was a crash coming.' There is, worse than in the 1930s, because people don't know how to make a garden like they did back then. People around here will want to shoot you for some toilet paper like during COVID. The morals have declined. If you see what I have seen coming—great trade wars, things with China holding back prescription medicine and medical supplies in retaliation—I've seen great dark days coming. But I've tried really hard not to focus on those, to be excited and warn you about the financial outpouring. But the Lord said it will be a window. A window is not very big. He said, 'Brandon, I will give you a window to bring forth the finances on your households to tell my people what's coming so that if they have ears to hear, they will not be taken by surprise.' A great shaking is going to take place for an awakening. But you as the bride are not to be shaken to awaken because you're already awake. You're the virgins with their lamps full of oil ready for the bridegroom to come. The shaking is the one last call that I warned you about. He said, 'One last call, and I'm calling forth the sheep in the back field.' How are we going to wake them up? He said to keep doing the same thing and expecting different results is insanity. We're going to have to do something drastic to get the ones that are totally asleep. I tell you this, as I traveled over the last couple of weeks praying over Florida, I realize how many people are still asleep. Diana and I and the kids are very much like hermits. It was a real eye-opening experience when you see how asleep everybody is. There are so many of you all that take offense to me saying that about Florida, but you're asleep. Maybe there's not so many of you that watch this channel, but I realized today how many truly are still asleep as I traveled thousands of miles sitting in the car just driving around, praying. When you have a child with special needs, you don't get out and walk a lot. We're still believing God for some things that I've never talked about, so we drive around and pray. We didn't want to push Megan in a wheelchair, so we just drove. I'm very sensitive to atmospheres, and the atmosphere was so bad in Miami that I turned around because I didn't want to deal with it. This is vacation; this isn't prayer time. There's a lot of intense spiritual warfare. I told Diana, 'Oh dear God, I want to just pray over some of this.' It's just being real when you're under so much spiritual pressure and hate from so many people—YouTubers that just want to ridicule you because they make content off of you. That's how they make their living, by being mean. I just go, 'Whatever produces a livelihood for you.' I'm not here to hate on them. I pray for these haters. But I know this, that Jesus is coming, and I'm going to keep saying it as loud as I can. I warned you about the tariffs and trade wars. But the Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm going to give you a window of opportunity to bring in money for your family.' Get a place to have a garden, get a place for a well, find a place in the country. For there will be days when people are looting and rioting in major cities. I saw them with signs saying, 'We want our entitlements.' If you thought during COVID was bad, I saw that on steroids because it was all around the United States. People were saying, 'We want our entitlements,' because the government cut off funding. I told you I saw a plague coming; I told you I saw these chicken shortages coming. Sometimes it's years. I warned you in 2023 that there would be trade wars and that there would be a time that there would be no medical supplies for major surgeries, like cosmetic surgeries. I saw that only serious surgeries would take place. I don't know when that will take place, but I saw a window of opportunity where they would not be able to do any kind of surgery unless it was life-threatening. You say, 'Brandon, that's so far out there.' I'm trying to tell you what I saw. It's not to scare you; it's just to prepare you. I warned you about food supplies and money shortages. But the Lord said He provides a window. If my people who are called by my name will humble themselves and pray, then they will hear from heaven and I will heal their land. The people interceded, and He said, 'Because of the intercessions of the righteous, I've granted you more time.' A great financial collapse was coming. I saw a dam of sludge, and I saw economic crisis across it. He said, 'I'm going to hold that back a little longer for you to have a window of opportunity to get your supplies ready, to get your household ready like Joseph.' Joseph had seven years of plenty and seven years of famine. The Lord told me He's going to provide for my family like He did for Joseph. If you are seeking Him, you will find Him. Jesus is a rewarder of those that diligently seek Him. I told you to watch Zelenskyy and Macron. I saw them devising a plan to try to keep this war stirred up. I warned you there would be major war in Europe, and I saw Putin striking Warsaw, Poland, with a bomb that has never been used before, technology we've never seen before. It was very destructive. I saw that a major draft would take place because of the outcry. I saw men and women going into this war. We pray for the Ukrainian people and the Russian people. We don't wrestle against flesh and blood, but against principalities and spiritual wickedness. I told you I saw an Antichrist spirit like that on Hitler rising up, trying to flap its wings. I saw the Antichrist spirit on a certain man behind a curtain, being groomed by demonic little devils. He's coming. But we would see an Ishmael with Macron in the days ahead, and I believe we will see Macron take more of a dictator-type role in the EU. I saw a rising up with Israel striking Iran, major strikes against their oil refineries. I saw major gas and oil deposits coming for Israel and the United States. I saw the major Nord Stream pipeline being renegotiated and trying to be opened. Major things taking place with Trump—'drill, baby, drill'—and major oil revenue. But I saw gas taking off because Iran was crippled. I saw gas lines for blocks long like it was in the 1970s. I warned everybody there would be a time of gas shortages. I saw tractors in fields not moving. I saw no water, no water, no water. I've warned you of great manipulation of the weather. Weather warfare is coming. They will manipulate the weather to be used against people demonically. As they try to control the weather, they will lose control of it with certain storms. It will cause great devastation with straight-line winds and hurricanes. There will be another level of hurricane strength, super hurricanes, super tornadoes, and super hail. Super straight-line winds—things that look biblical in proportion that are trying to be made by man demonically to manipulate countries and people. Folks, we're so close to Jesus's return. Even if it's 20 years, that's nothing on the scale of eternity. We're right at the door. No man knows the day or the hour, but I have an urgency in my spirit. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, there's not an urgency in my body, for my return is imminent.' I want to remind you that on March 14th, we have a blood-red moon, a significant sign concerning war. Kim Clement prophesied that Trump would be a peace president. The Lord told me that is the cry of Trump's heart: for peace. But as we see the birthing pains accelerate, we will see things that we did not know we would see—wars, rumors of wars, plagues, and earthquakes. I told you I saw the black horse riding with scales in his hands. The Lord told me famine and the plague will go hand in hand. The chlorophyll horse—the green chlorophyll horse—and the black horse will ride together like brothers. Brandon, I want you all to have an urgency. I'm excited because Jesus is coming. If you remember the Five Pillars Trump brought up—Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, XRP, and then another. He said almost all five pillars. I said the Five Pillars have extensions: XLM, Cardano, and he brought those up. Algorand, things like that. I warned you about the Five Pillars, and I saw all the other cryptos falling like stars. They brought stability and structure to the market because it's too volatile. The Lord said there will be great volatility and shakeouts. If you're a bandwagon person who didn't hear this for yourself, there'll be days of great shakeouts because you didn't hear God. There'll be 1% of you that remain wealthy—1% of you that will maintain the wealth for the end-time harvest. The rest of you will be broke and lose it all within a 24-hour period. You will lose everything. 1% of you will be dead to self enough to keep what's coming. That is very small. But if you are listening to Him, you will know what to do with this money, and God will use you to make billionaires for the kingdom. There will be multi-billionaires that rise up in these last days. There'll be 1% of you. But a lot of bandwagon people will lose it all that fast. You have to be led by your spirit, not your flesh. You say, 'I'll just put it in this or that.' I told you there are plans about taxes. The enemy has a plan to snare you and take everything you have. You have to listen to the Holy Spirit. You say, 'Well, I'm going by what Q said.' Who in the world is Q? Don't be listening to weirdness or conspiracy theories; listen to the Spirit of the Lord. Give to Caesar what is Caesar's. If you don't pay your taxes, you'll go to jail. The Lord told me the enemy is going to try to snare you with the Dinar, with greed and lust. You think you're going to do this on your own? You are mistaken. You must remain filled with and controlled by the Holy Spirit. What is the Father saying to you? Are you a bandwagon Christian following trends? Do not follow trends; follow the voice of the Lord. Don't follow my channel and say, 'Brother Brandon said this, so it must be good.' I'm human; I can miss it. You must be led by the Spirit for yourself. I'm nobody special, just a sinner saved by grace. But I'm hungry and thirsty. Let's pray together. You say, 'Brandon, I'm not going to be that 1% that loses everything.' Father, we thank you for every person here. We believe they are going to be that 1% who die to self. You must die to self. A dead man doesn't have emotions, doesn't feel rejection or anger. A dead man is dead. I want to be less of me and more of Him. A dead man doesn't get upset when people persecute him. 1%—that number is not very big. Oh, that you would be so close to Him. All it takes is one second for your life to never be the same. It's just a yielded surrender. Father, I thank you for your presence. We ask for revival even on this street. I pray for Megan; I thank you that she is healed of that cough right now. I pray for everyone here today, that you're healed and whole in the name of Jesus from every virus and plague. I call you healed and whole. I thank you, Father, that they're filled with the Holy Ghost and that there's an anointing on them to set the captives free. I thank you that you will provide everything they need. I pray marriages be restored and children come home. I call wayward children home right now. I call for the blinders to come off their eyes. Faith calls those things that be not as though they were. Now they're healed, now they're delivered. We believe and receive today. Harvesters and sowers will go hand in hand. Amen. If this video blessed you, please subscribe. We'll never ask you for money. If anybody asks you for anything on social media, it is not us. We won't ask for crypto or donations. Freely we give. God is a rewarder of those that seek Him. The Lord said, 'Brandon, I want you to pray over that picture and bless that family.' Someone sent a picture of their family. If you want us to pray for your family, send a picture. Put their name on the back so I know who it is. My wife, children, and I will pray over those pictures every day. It's an honor. God bless you all. Have a wonderful day. Bye-bye.]
